title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
slides: Can Asian AI startups outpace Anthropic's banned exports?
New 'Mythos' models rival Claude's reasoning capabilities.
They bypass restrictions Anthropic couldn't fight or lift.
Your enterprise now sources safe, high-tier AI from Asia.
Test one Mythos variant against your current workflow today.
thread_text:
1. Asian AI outruns US bans.

Anthropic could not block these exports, but a Beijing startup just shipped a model that beats Claude on reasoning.

2. Mythos models unlock hidden capabilities.

They were built to dodge restrictions that locked down US exports. Enterprises now have access to a tier Anthropic couldn't protect.

3. Your supply chain just shifted.

Asia now sources safe, high-tier reasoning models without the compliance headaches that stalled Western deployments.

4. What can a Mythos variant actually do?

One test against your current workflow reveals if it outperforms Claude on the tasks you run daily—no setup required.

5. Test one Mythos variant today.

Take a complex reasoning task from your pipeline and run it on Mythos. If you haven’t, start there this week.
video_script: Asian startups now outrun US export bans.
Mythos models rival Claude's reasoning but are unrestricted.
They bypassed blocks Anthropic couldn't fight.
Your enterprise can now source safe Asian AI.
Test a Mythos variant on your workflow today.

script: Asian startups now outrun US export bans.
Mythos models rival Claude's reasoning but are unrestricted.
They bypassed blocks Anthropic couldn't fight.
Your enterprise can now source safe Asian AI.
Test a Mythos variant on your workflow today.

instagram.caption:
Anthropic couldn't stop exports of its top-tier model, but a Beijing startup just shipped one that matches Claude on reasoning — and it's already live.

These new "Mythos" models were built to sidestep the exact restrictions that locked down US shipments. Asian enterprises now get a capability tier Anthropic failed to protect.

For anyone sourcing AI for content or production workflows: your supply chain just gained a compliant, high-tier alternative without the compliance headaches. Write off US export bans as a bottleneck.

Can a single test against your daily task stack prove one Mythos variant beats what you're using now? 🧪
